problem: [BUG] / [HELP] "Model does not support multimodal input [...] Use a vision-capable model" for TextFile input. I am trying to pass TextFiles to my Crew via the 'input_files' parameter. Since the update to crewai 1.10 -> 1.12.2, this results in an Error when using non-multimodel models.
memory_hint:
I fixed this exact issue by 1. Create a new crewai Crew (`crewai create crew demo`)
2. Adapt the run() method to include a input file
3. Select a model like claude-sonnet-4.6
4.
failure_without_memory: [BUG] / [HELP] "Model does not support multimodal input [...] Use a vision-capable model" for TextFile input. When using only text files, I don't expect to need a vision-capable model. I expect the model to digest the actual text of the files, not 'look' at it. Increase timeout or reduce payload.
